payload.input_str: {'sql': 'SELECT c.Continent, COUNT(DISTINCT cm.Id) AS CarMakersCount FROM continents c JOIN countries co ON c.ContId = co.Continent JOIN car_makers cm ON co.CountryId = cm.Country GROUP BY c.Continent;'}

inputs.sql: SELECT c.Continent, COUNT(DISTINCT cm.Id) AS CarMakersCount FROM continents c JOIN countries co ON c.ContId = co.Continent JOIN car_makers cm ON co.CountryId = cm.Country GROUP BY c.Continent;

final.final_sql: SELECT c.Continent, COUNT(DISTINCT cm.Id) AS CarMakersCount FROM continents c JOIN countries co ON c.ContId = co.Continent JOIN car_makers cm ON co.CountryId = cm.Country GROUP BY c.Continent;
final.answer_text: There are 4 car makers in America, 7 in Asia, and 11 in Europe.
